stream_samples.text: edge function cold-start back to 1.4s p95 in iad1 since the runtime upgrade. used to be 280ms. our LCP regressed by half a second.
ISR revalidate is taking 90s+ to invalidate across regions for a marketing site on Pro. my CMS team thinks the site is broken.
[#71204] Next 15.1.4 + App Router: streaming response stalls on Edge runtime when route-level cache headers are present
[#5803 P1] Build queue depth holding at 800+ on Pro since 09:00 UTC, customers reporting 12-15min queue waits for hobby-tier-style traffic
Vercel KV connection pool exhaustion at ~600 RPM on Pro tier. Docs claim 10k. Support said "reach out for higher limits". yeah no.
preview deployment URLs randomized again on the latest CLI release. our QA scripts are all hardcoded. @vercel pls
edge_cold_start_p95 SLO breach for 9h, iad1 + sfo1 affected. region failover not pulling traffic away.
[adapter-next] Server Actions returning 504 on Edge runtime when payload >1MB — request body buffering broken since 15.1
Postgres pool exhaustion on Vercel Postgres at ~150 concurrent connections. We're paying for the Pro tier.
[alert] edge.cold_start.p95 > 1200ms threshold for 12 of 14 windows in past 6h, regions: iad1, sfo1, fra1
Build cache miss rate jumped to ~40% after the v36.1 builder image roll-out. our 14min builds went to 22min.
v0 + ship-to-Vercel flow is genuinely magical for landing pages. shipped a campaign in 30 min.
anyone know if the dashboard analytics are using the new pricing model already or still grandfathered?
Custom domain SSL cert renewal failed silently for 4 customers, expired before retry kicked in. now scrambling.

clusters.title: Edge function cold-start regression on iad1/sfo1
Build queue depth on Pro tier
Next.js 15.x edge streaming + Server Actions bugs

top_epic.title: Restore edge function cold-start to sub-300ms on iad1/sfo1
top_epic.rationale: 2,280 cross-channel signals (X, HN, GitHub Issues, Datadog) trace the same regression: edge cold-start p95 jumped from ~280ms to 1.4s after the runtime upgrade, breaching SLO across iad1, sfo1 and fra1 for 9 hours straight. Customers are watching their LCP regress by half a second — a directly measurable conversion hit on the marketing-site cohort.
top_epic.verdict: Revenue-critical — every 100ms of cold-start is a measurable conversion loss for our biggest customers.
top_epic.recommendation: Roll back the runtime upgrade, ship a snapshot-warm-pool fix, and gate future runtime PRs on a regional cold-start budget.
acceptance_criteria: Edge cold-start p95 < 300ms in iad1, sfo1 and fra1 for 7 consecutive days
Snapshot warm-pool hit-rate above 92% across all primary regions
Per-region cold-start SLO with PagerDuty escalation under 600ms
Runtime PR CI gate that fails on any regional p95 regression > 10%
